compiled_state.title: [7eb8-af48] GREEN: Implement .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh (no suppression)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Create .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh — enforcement hook that blocks ANY commit introducing plugins/dso into files under plugins/dso/. No suppression, no annotation bypass.

## Hook behavior
Scan staged files. For each file under plugins/dso/:
- grep for plugins/dso
- If found on ANY line → block commit, print file:line and guidance
- NO grep -v for any annotation
- NO pass-through for any tag

## Files to create
- .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh (chmod +x)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hook exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh
- [ ] Hook has NO grep -v bypass
  Verify: ! grep -q "grep -v" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh
- [ ] Hook has NO plugin-self-ref-ok reference
  Verify: ! grep -q "plugin-self-ref-ok" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh
- [ ] All hook tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh
